2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function mpol_set_shared_policy_range() that installs an already-built policy over an arbitrary page range in the shared policy tree. The function takes as input the shared policy, start and end page offsets, and a fully-built policy. This allows for more flexibility when binding policies to backing inodes from in-kernel code. Additionally, mpol_set_shared_policy() is reimplemented as a thin wrapper that derives its range from a VMA, sharing an underlying path with the new function.
